content.query:
DROP TABLE [EDW].[FACT_JOB_PAYMENT]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[FACT_JOB_PAYMENT]
( 
	[JobPaymentID] [nvarchar](100)  NOT NULL,
	[JobID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[PaymentTypeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[PaymentMethodID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[PaymentDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[ARBatchDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[IncBatchDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[ARBatchNo] [int]  NULL,
	[IncBatchNo] [int]  NULL,
	[ARBatchFLag] INT NULL,
	[IncBatchFlag] INT NULL,
	[PaymentAmount] [decimal](19,4)  NULL,
	[PaymentNotes] NVARCHAR(4000) NULL,
	[LP_JobPaymentID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_JobID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_PaymentTypeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LP_PaymentMethodID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](100)  NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [datetime2](7)  NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = HASH ( [JobPaymentID] ),
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
